basic_details.job_title: ONGC Energy Centre Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Project Fellow, Project Associates and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest ONGC Energy Centre (ONGC EC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Fellows/Associates posts! Published through the official notification, this new recruitment drive offers 5 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing qualifications like M.Tech/B.Tech/M.Sc in Geology, Geophysics, Geosciences, Mechanical Engineering, Biotechnology, or Microbiology with relevant experience can apply via email before 25 May 2026. Find all details about the ONGC Energy Centre new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/B.Tech/M.Sc in Geology/Geophysics/Geosciences/Mechanical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology, Minimum 60% marks, 2-6 years experience in relevant energy domain
qualification.details: Junior Project Associate (Geologist): M.Tech with minimum 60% marks in Geology/Geophysics/Geosciences + 2 years experience OR B.Tech/M.Sc with minimum 60% marks + 4 years experience in energy domain or Exploration of radioactive minerals/Hydrocarbons. Senior Project Fellow (Geologist): M.Sc. Geology or M.Sc./M.Tech. in Applied Geology/Earth Sciences/Mineral Exploration/Petroleum Geosciences with minimum 60% marks + 2 years experience in Exploration of minerals/hydrocarbons/Lab analysis of cores. Project Associate (Biotechnology): M.Tech. relevant to energy field + 4 years experience in Bioenergy domain OR B.Tech./M.Sc. in Microbiology/Biotechnology + 6 years experience in Bioenergy domain. Junior Project Associate (Geothermal): M.Tech with minimum 60% marks in Mechanical Engineering + 2 years experience in Geothermal exploration OR B.Tech/M.Sc + 4 years experience in Energy domain.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 7.58 Lakhs - Rs. 11.88 Lakhs Per Annum
salary_details.details: Junior Project Associate (Geologist): Rs. 9.9 Lakhs per annum CTC (Ph.D. additional Rs. 10,000/- per month) Senior Project Fellow (Geologist): Rs. 7.58 Lakhs per annum CTC Project Associate (Biotechnology): Rs. 11.88 Lakhs per annum CTC (Ph.D. additional Rs. 10,000/- per month) Junior Project Associate (Geothermal): Rs. 9.9 Lakhs per annum CTC (Ph.D. additional Rs. 10,000/- per month)

selection_process: Screening of Application Formats Interview of Short-listed candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ONGC Energy Centre Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ONGC Energy Centre recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ONGC Energy Centre Project Fellows/Associates recruitment is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Fellows/Associates posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Project Fellows/Associates positions at ONGC Energy Centre.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from M.Tech/B.Tech/M.Sc in relevant fields like Geology, Geophysics, Geosciences, Mechanical Engineering, Biotechnology, or Microbiology, with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for ONGC Energy Centre recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 7.58 Lakhs to Rs. 11.88 Lakhs Per Annum, with additional benefits for Ph.D. holders in certain positions.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply by sending their application via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ONGC Energy Centre Project Fellows/Associates?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of application formats, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Fellows/Associates at ONGC Energy Centre are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any specific experience required for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have relevant experience ranging from 2 to 6 years in the specified energy domain, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
